products.title: Inbound Lead Responder
products.tagline: AI Reply + Qualify + Book in Under 60 Seconds
products.description: An AI agent connected to a local business's Instagram DMs, Facebook Messenger, and website chat. Responds to inbound messages in under 60 seconds, qualifies leads, and books appointments directly into the calendar. Solves the universal small-business problem of losing leads because they reply too slowly. Sold to local service businesses (salons, gyms, clinics, real estate) at $297/mo recurring.
products.subject_line: Your DMs are full of leads. They're going cold while you're busy.
wins: One operator runs dozens of clients
before_bullets: Owner replies hours or days late
Hot leads go cold to competitors
after_bullets: Unified inbox across IG, FB, web
products.why_works: Speed-to-lead is the #1 conversion lever for local services. The AI never sleeps and always replies first.

products.title: Faceless Video Studio
products.tagline: 12–60 Short-Form Videos a Month, Done For You
products.description: A monthly subscription that produces 12–60 short-form faceless videos for clients' TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. We script, voice, edit, caption, and post everything for them. Sold into two segments — local businesses at $297–497/mo and online coaches/agencies at $497–997/mo. 100% recurring revenue, fully automatable.
products.subject_line: 12 short-form videos a month. You don't lift a finger.
delivers: Scheduled posting across IG, TikTok, YT
wins: Two buyer segments on one engine
One operator runs dozens of clients
before_bullets: Owners can't keep up with 5+ videos/wk
On-camera anxiety blocks half the niche
products.why_works: Short-form video is the dominant attention surface and almost no SMB can sustain it. We do the whole loop for them, monthly.

products.title: MenuLift
products.tagline: AI Menu Optimizer for Independent Restaurants in Tourist Areas
products.description: Independent restaurants in tourist zones leak revenue on the menu itself — generic descriptions, dishes ordered by category instead of margin, round-number pricing, no translation for the foreign visitors walking in. MenuLift scrapes their menu from Facebook, Google Maps, or delivery apps, AI rewrites every description, reorders by margin, applies psychological pricing, and translates into 5 tourist languages (English, Korean, Mandarin, Japanese, Spanish). Delivered as a printable PDF in the cold email. ₱9,900 one-time.
flow: Scrape Menu From FB / Maps / Delivery
products.subject_line: Your menu — rewritten, repriced, translated for tourists.
delivers: Print-ready PDF in the cold email
wins: Empty competitive lane in tourist zones
PDF preview in cold email = the demo
Translates revenue lift into one print run
before_bullets: English-only menu in a tourist street
Dishes ordered by category, not margin
Round-number pricing leaves $ on the table
Tourists order the cheapest familiar thing
products.why_works: Cold-email a printable PDF that lifts every check size — the owner just prints it. Empty lane, walk-in close, ₱9,900.
